title: Eva 0 after Instrumentality
wikitext:
[]: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by GiftedPilot » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:09 pm In the End of Evangelion, What happened to unit 0? I know 1 is in space and 2is destroyed by the MP's, but does it ever explain what happened to 0?

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by Dream » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:22 pm Most likely the same thing that happened to the MPEs, getting turned into statues (or something like that) Although surely other users more into those aspect of the series could give you a better answer.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:23 pm Unit-00 blew up in episode 23.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:28 pm Uh, guys, Rei activated Unit-00's self-destruct function in order to destroy Armisael in Episode 23, remember? It was in bits and pieces after that. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:29 pm The only real things that survived the explosion are the entry plug and Rei, well at least in the from of Kentucky fried Rei

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:30 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: Kentucky fried Rei

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 18, 2012 9:31 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Kudos, Knightmare. I've never heard that one before.

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Fri Oct 19, 2012 2:23 am KnightmareX13 wrote: Kentucky fried Rei

[]:             Quote Post by GiftedPilot » Fri Oct 19, 2012 8:30 pm Oh Duh. I guess I just can't think straight.

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by angelofgendo » Tue Nov 07, 2023 2:31 am Ritsuko told Shinji and Misato that evas are human. The human instrumentality project combined all humans into one. Therefore, Unit 00 became LCL like everyone else. Now, does it have the choice to be reincarnated as an Eva? If someone builds it a new body perhaps.

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by Cathihejithe » Wed Mar 06, 2024 7:29 pm Not much I'd assume. Seeing as it was destroyed in the explosion during the battle with Armisael in episode 23.

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Mar 07, 2024 3:34 pm The soul in Unit-00 is Rei 1. Wouldn't she come back as Rei 1, not Unit-00?

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Thu Jun 20, 2024 6:34 pm thewayneiac wrote: The soul in Unit-00 is Rei 1. Wouldn't she come back as Rei 1, not Unit-00?

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by Into the Eva-Verse » Fri Jun 21, 2024 11:14 am Asunji_Yuko wrote: thewayneiac#942924 wrote: The soul in Unit-00 is Rei 1. Wouldn't she come back as Rei 1, not Unit-00?

[]: Re: Eva 0 after Instrumentality             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Jun 23, 2024 1:04 pm Into the Eva-Verse wrote: If memory serves, Rei I had her own soul, then after her death, her soul or a portion of it was placed in Unit 00 and Lilith's soul was placed in Rei II onward.
